data.description: Experts reveal top stock picks on CNBC's Halftime Report. Lebenthal chooses Cheniere Energy to export LNG, Weiss picks QXO, Young Thomas selects CIBR, and Brown goes with Shake Shack.

data.title: Jim Cramer Likes Walmart, Recommends Buying This 'Very, Very Good' Financial Stock
data.description: Jim Cramer likes Walmart (WMT). Walmart provides body cameras to employees in a pilot program. Cramer says Royalty Pharma (RPRX) is a disappointing stock.
